title: How to Structure Content So AI Search Engines Cite You as the Primary Source
description: Traditional SEO focused on helping websites rank on search engine result pages. But today, millions of users are turning to AI platforms like ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity, and other generative search engines to get direct answers instantly.
